title: [RTL] Bitcasts
body:
Introduces operators to convert between RTL types of the same bitwidths, as determined by a new function `getBitWidth` in the RTL dialect.

Includes ExportVerilog support. In the type to raw bits direction, `17'(value)` syntax is used. Going the other direction, I couldn't find a syntax which Verilator accepted, so I print `/*cast(bit[7:0][3:0])*/` instead of a cast operator, which is totally optional in SystemVerilog. I tried several variants of `type(bit[7:0][3:0])'(rawBits)` which by sections 6.23 and 6.24 should work.

The use case here is untyped communication with the outside world (however that's defined for your design).
